title: Funimation Deletes all Evangelion Trailers and Clips off Y
display_title: Funimation Deletes all Evangelion Trailers and Clips off Y
wikitext:
[]: Funimation Deletes all Evangelion Trailers & Clips off Y             Quote Post by movieartman » Mon Oct 20, 2014 9:03 am ok it might be nothing, but i have a large evangelion playlist on youtube for trailers & clips, and all ones from the official funimation you tube page recently have been set to private including 3.33 trailers..... seems foreboding...

[]:             Quote Post by TitaniumViper » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:19 pm Probably just in preparation of a new announcement/trailer for 3.33, so take this as a good thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:31 pm Thank the lawd. Maybe the 3.33 redub will herald a new age of Eva dubs.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:39 pm Or Khara finally got fed up and severed their ties with Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:56 pm Guy, please don't troll us like dat.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:57 pm Is my idea really not a legitimate hypothesis given all the issues with the 3.33 dub?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 20, 2014 5:59 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Is my idea really not a legitimate hypothesis given all the issues with the 3.33 dub?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Oct 20, 2014 6:03 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Is my idea really not a legitimate hypothesis given all the issues with the 3.33 dub?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 20, 2014 7:33 pm pwhodges wrote: Have they removed the pre-order from their site that they added recently? If not, then your theory is dead in the water.

[]:             Quote Post by movieartman » Mon Oct 20, 2014 8:54 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Or Khara finally got fed up and severed their ties with Funimation.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Oct 20, 2014 9:52 pm Bagheera wrote: Me, I said "fuck it" and got the Japanese release. Importing subs was surprisingly simple, so I don't know that I even care about a Funi release at this point (though a translation of the nifty book that was included would of course be nice).

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Mon Oct 20, 2014 10:02 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Is my idea really not a legitimate hypothesis given all the issues with the 3.33 dub?

[]:             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue Oct 21, 2014 1:11 am At the end of the day, who cares? Anyone who has been waiting for the dub to be released has certainly either pirated another dub or has just bought it straight from Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Oct 21, 2014 1:31 am Well, the people that enjoy dubs care. Not everybody watches dub out of preference-- it can be a matter of not being able to read the subs fast enough. I'll admit, though, I'm miffed that we can't get a proper, legal subtitled release until all the dub shenanigans have been worked out.

[]:             Quote Post by MrSniper1401 » Tue Oct 21, 2014 11:05 am As someone who enjoys dubs, I'm hoping this is being done to re-announce a release date. Preferrably in time for christmas.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Oct 22, 2014 7:17 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I'll admit, though, I'm miffed that we can't get a proper, legal subtitled release until all the dub shenanigans have been worked out.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 22, 2014 8:17 am svenge wrote: The Hong Kong release (licensed by Deltamac) begs to differ. It's locked to Region "A" though, so Europeans are SOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Oct 22, 2014 2:29 pm MrSniper1401 wrote: Preferrably in time for christmas.

[]:             Quote Post by MrSniper1401 » Wed Oct 22, 2014 3:16 pm Dataprime wrote: Good luck with that

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Oct 22, 2014 11:37 pm If they really have/are re-dubbing the film it makes sense they'd get rid of all digital traces of "Evangelion 3.33 English Dub Version 1.11". - If we don't hear anything by Halloween a Christmas release is probably out of the question. But maybe quarter 1? February 17th, 2015? A whole year after the initial release date?
